data.name: PageTitle
data.value: Access

data.name: PageHeading
data.value: Access, roles, and scope

data.name: Intro
data.value: UncannyPrompt separates platform administration from Tenant collaboration. Users sign in to the app, work in a current Tenant, Workspace, and Project, and receive capabilities through roles or explicit shares.

data.name: SigningInTitle
data.value: Signing in

data.name: SigningInProviders
data.value: The app can use configured external providers such as Google, GitHub, or Microsoft Entra ID.

data.name: SigningInProvisioning
data.value: A valid external identity can provision an active application user.

data.name: SigningInPersonalTenant
data.value: When a user has no Tenant yet, the app creates a Personal Tenant for that user.

data.name: SigningInSignOut
data.value: Signing out clears the application session without changing the external identity provider.

data.name: ScopeTitle
data.value: Current scope

data.name: ScopeCurrentTenant
data.value: The Tenant switcher defines the top-level boundary for Workspaces, Projects, members, and audit.

data.name: ScopeWorkspaceProject
data.value: The selected Workspace and Project keep listings focused and let users move from Workspaces to Projects and from Projects to prompts.

data.name: ScopePublicLinks
data.value: Public links are separate from normal membership and can expose selected prompt content through revocable tokens.

data.name: RolesTitle
data.value: Tenant roles

data.name: RolesIntro
data.value: Roles describe the broad permissions a user has inside a Tenant. Explicit shares can grant narrower access to selected content.

data.name: RoleHeader
data.value: Role

data.name: RoleMeaningHeader
data.value: Meaning

data.name: TenantOwnerRole
data.value: Tenant Owner

data.name: TenantOwnerDescription
data.value: Full Tenant ownership, including members, roles, Projects, prompt content, sharing, and audit.

data.name: TenantManagerRole
data.value: Tenant Manager

data.name: TenantManagerDescription
data.value: Manages Tenant collaboration and operational content without being the owner of the Tenant.

data.name: WorkspaceManagerRole
data.value: Workspace Manager

data.name: WorkspaceManagerDescription
data.value: Can manage Projects, prompts, folders, variables, sharing, and publishing inside the working area.

data.name: ProjectContributorRole
data.value: Project Contributor

data.name: ProjectContributorDescription
data.value: Can create and edit prompt content, folders, tags, variables, and versions.

data.name: ReviewerRole
data.value: Reviewer

data.name: ReviewerDescription
data.value: Can view prompts, versions, and exported content for review-oriented workflows.

data.name: ViewerRole
data.value: Viewer

data.name: ViewerDescription
data.value: Can view prompt content and versions without changing the catalog.
